{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Gold stage
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Gold stage]] is a level of advancement for [[sacred artists]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
